title: Copper Uses
description: Replaces Iron with Copper in some recipes to make copper a more useful metal.
body:
# Why Copper is an underused ingredient in this game, I have chests of the stuff. In the real world copper is used to carry electricity like redstone does in the game. So why not make copper useful like redstone # Recipes ![Piston Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f07a47ff51b4a9382044e260c6769c973db34d82.png)
